heading: Determination of quality of paper
label: 514 Determination of quality of paper
text: The Joint Committee on Printing shall determine differences of opinion between the Director of the Government Publishing Office and a contractor for paper respecting the paper’s quality; and the decision of the Committee is final as to the United States.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 10 (, ; , ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 828 Stat. 602Mar. 3, 1917, ch. 163, § 639 Stat. 1121
Amendments2014— substituted “Director of the Government Publishing Office” for “Public Printer”.Pub. L. 113–235
